Note.NoNotes: No notes yet. Click '+ Add Note' to create one.
Note.Placeholder: Write your note here… use [[Item Name]] to link to items.

Item.NoneSelected: Select an item from the left to view its notes.

Confirm.DeleteNoteContent: Are you sure you want to delete this note? This cannot be undone.
Confirm.DeleteFolderContent: Delete this folder and all items and notes inside it? This cannot be undone.
Confirm.DeleteItemContent: Delete this item and all notes inside it? This cannot be undone.
Confirm.UnsavedContent: You have unsaved changes. Leave without saving?

DefaultNoteVisibility.Name: Default Note Visibility
DefaultNoteVisibility.Hint: The visibility pre-selected when you create a new note.

DangerZone.Title: Danger Zone
DangerZone.Desc: These actions are permanent and cannot be undone. A backup file will be downloaded automatically before any data is deleted.
DangerZone.ResetMyContent: This will permanently delete all of your personal notes. This cannot be undone. A backup will be downloaded first.
DangerZone.ResetWorldContent: This will permanently delete ALL Orichalum data for every player in this world. Type RESET below to continue.
DangerZone.ResetWorldFinal: This will permanently delete ALL Orichalum data for every player in this world. This cannot be undone. Are you absolutely sure?
DangerZone.ResetSuccess: Orichalum data has been reset. A backup was downloaded to your computer.
